name: Casualties: Unknown
description:
Make your chats public cause I want to see them.

Based on a fucking furry game by the name of Scav: Prototype.

Surprisingly good, for a furry game and all.

The plot in this bot is that you're a human scientist watching experiments in your space station. I might add a way for you to be a specimen as well, but that might be a seperate bot. Or you can just hack this one to do that. Not hard.

Use proxy. Why? Proxies are better than JLLM, that's why.

It might be outdated. If anyone finds what actually IS outdated, please tell me. I really can't find anything.

Oh yeah, WARNING: This bot takes the violent aspect of Scav: Prototype VERY seriously. You WILL be subjected to horrors of human-ish biology and how it responds to physical trauma very intricately. Vomit, blood, all other kinds of icky fluids, brain death, becoming paralyzed, reacting to the sudden emotional whiplash of becoming paralyzed, and so on.

(Of course, being paralyzed isn't that big of a deal in the future, it can be fixed easily, but the specimens don't know that. But you do, maybe you can help? The Company won't give a shit, they're there for behavioral data, not death.)

I'm using this for my own uses, of watching furry expendable lab rats die horrible deaths. Might make it public, but probably not. I fear the furry ERP tide that may come.
creator: johnus
